title: androstachys johnsonii
intro: Androstachys johnsonii, also known as the dragon's blood tree, is a tree species native to the tropical forests of southern Africa. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral agent. The health benefits of Androstastachys johnsonii include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support immune function, making it a popular choice in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of the plant typically involve drying and processing the resin, which is then used in various forms, including capsules, tinctures, and topical creams, to harness its medicinal properties.
